source_rationale: The recovery of this gene revealed that Glut6MnPO is likely the heat activated neuron type as it is labeled by all three warmth markers (Ptger3, Bdnf, Pacap).
The recovery of this gene revealed that Glut6MnPO is likely the heat activated neuron type as it is labeled by all three warmth markers (Ptger3, Bdnf, Pacap).
The recovery of this gene revealed that Glut6MnPO is likely the heat activated neuron type as it is labeled by all three warmth markers (Ptger3, Bdnf, Pacap).

Furthermore, this analysis also revealed that three neuron classes Glut1MnPO, Glut2MnPO, and Glut3MnPO are likely the thirst state encoding neurons as they are labeled by all thirst markers as well as Etv1 that was recently shown to exclusively label thirst activated neuron classes in related lamina terminalis nuclei11.

Furthermore, this analysis also revealed that three neuron classes Glut1MnPO, Glut2MnPO, and Glut3MnPO are likely the thirst state encoding neurons as they are labeled by all thirst markers as well as Etv1 that was recently shown to exclusively label thirst activated neuron classes in related lamina terminalis nuclei11.

Furthermore, this analysis also revealed that three neuron classes Glut1MnPO, Glut2MnPO, and Glut3MnPO are likely the thirst state encoding neurons as they are labeled by all thirst markers as well as Etv1 that was recently shown to exclusively label thirst activated neuron classes in related lamina terminalis nuclei11.

Finally, the markers for cold and ingestion activated neurons appear to exclusively label a single cell type each (Glut4MnPO for cold, Gaba1MnPO for ingestion) that collectively suggests a clear mapping of previously uncovered physiological functions to the underlying neuron classes (Extended Fig. 3d,e).
